name: Ketamine
description: Suuxinta kala-baxa oo bixisa xanuunka xanuunka, suuxinta, iyo amnesia iyadoo la ilaalinayo falcelinta marin-haweedka iyo xasilloonida hemodynamic. Xanuunada xanuunka ee la door biday ee TCCC -- waxay ilaalisaa BP ka duwan opioids. Sidoo kale loo isticmaalo suuxinta nidaamka iyo RSI.
dose: Xannuunka: 0.1-0.3 mg/kg IV/IO ( riixid tartiib ah) | 0.5 mg/kg IM. Suuxinta nidaamka: 1-2 mg/kg IV | 4-6 mg/kg IM. Soo jeedinta RSI: 1-2 mg/kg IV.
contraindications: schizophrenia la yaqaan ama waallida firfircoon
Sare u kaca ICP iyada oo aan la ilaalin marin hawo-mareen (qaraabo)
warnings: Dareen-celinta soo-baxa (delirium/hallucinations) -- ku yareyso midazolam 1-2mg IV haddii la heli karo.
Waxay kordhisaa dheecaanka -- diyaar u ahaanshaha nuugista.
Laryngospasm naadir ah laakiin suurtagal ah -- hay BVM diyaar ah.

pediatric.dose: Xannuunka: 0.5 mg/kg IV. Suuxinta nidaamka: 1-2 mg/kg IV | 4-5 mg/kg IM.
pediatric.note: Si fiican u bartay cilmiga carruurta. Loo door biday hababka xanuunka badan.

obstetric.note: Ammaan ka ah xanuunka hooyada marka qiyaas yar la qaato. Waxa laga yaabaa inay keento niyad-jabka neef-mareenka ee dhallaanka ah oo qiyaaso sarreeya haddii la dhasho wakhtiga dhalmada ku dhow.

source: JTS CPG: Acute Pain Management / TCCC Guidelines
